description: Storage profile contract for the Cairn distributed framework. This file declares future FeatureData, media, MediaIndex, and RelayPool storage locations without replacing the current dataSources/sourceLinkModes runtime chain.

write.reason: CM_STORAGE_PROFILE_1 only introduces the profile contract. Write operations remain reserved for future RelayPackage/apply patches.

compatibility.notes: The current service site continues to read Data_Merge through the existing dat-mode data source logic.

write.reason: Media writes remain handled by the existing data-maintenance workflow until MediaIndex and RelayPackage apply tools are introduced.

compatibility.notes: This profile records the current Picture storage area only; it does not move image relationships into MediaIndex yet.

write.reason: MediaIndex schemas and builders are scheduled for DATA_MEDIA_INDEX_CONTRACT_1.

compatibility.notes: Reserved profile for future MediaIndex work. Feature JSON image behavior is unchanged in this patch.

write.reason: RelayPool submission and review integration are scheduled for later RelayPackage and service/admin module patches.

compatibility.notes: Reserved profile for future user submission and admin review workflows.

compatibility.currentDataRuntime: sourceLinkModes.json selects a raw-compatible base URL; dataSources.json keeps per-world dat-mode Data_Merge/Picture loading.
compatibility.nextIntendedPatch: DATA_FEATURE_REPO_CONTRACT_1 or CM_RELAY_PACKAGE_PROTOCOL_1, after the StorageProfile contract is accepted.
